sentences.arabic: رَجَعَ عُمَرُ إِلَى البَيْتِ بَعْدَ المَدْرَسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Omer se vratio kući nakon škole.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ الغَدَاءَ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهِ ثُمَّ اسْتَرَاحَ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Ručao je s porodicom, a zatim se malo odmarao.
sentences.translationEn: He ate lunch with his family and then rested a little.

sentences.arabic: فَتَحَ كِتَابَهُ وَبَدَأَ يَكْتُبُ الوَاجِبَ المَنْزِلِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Otvorio je knjigu i počeo pisati domaći zadatak.
sentences.translationEn: He opened his book and began writing his homework.

sentences.translation: Omer je pažljivo napisao odgovore na pitanja.
sentences.translationEn: Omar carefully wrote the answers to the questions.

sentences.translation: Završio je domaći zadatak i osjetio olakšanje.
sentences.translationEn: He finished his homework and felt relieved.
